routes.documentation:
ISO8583 Financial Transaction Request — MTI 0200 (Purchase Authorization)

SAMPLE REQUEST — Approved (amount ≤ 5000):
POST http://localhost:5000/iso
Content-Type: application/json
{
  "mti": "0200",
  "fields": {
    "2": "5413330089010012",
    "3": "000000",
    "4": "000000001000",
    "11": "123456",
    "41": "TERM001"
  }
}

SAMPLE REQUEST — Insufficient Funds (amount > 5000):
{
  "mti": "0200",
  "fields": {
    "2": "5413330089010012",
    "3": "000000",
    "4": "000000010000",
    "11": "654321",
    "41": "TERM001"
  }
}

SAMPLE REQUEST — Simulate Timeout:
Add header: X-Simulate-Timeout: true

RESPONSE CODES:
  00 = Approved
  51 = Insufficient Funds
  30 = Format Error (missing MTI)
  40 = Invalid Amount
  68 = Response Received Too Late (timeout)

FIELD MAP:
  2  = PAN (Primary Account Number)
  3  = Processing Code
  4  = Amount (12-digit zero-padded, in cents)
  11 = STAN (System Trace Audit Number)
  38 = Authorization ID Response
  39 = Response Code
  41 = Card Acceptor Terminal ID
  44 = Additional Response Data (timestamp)

responses.label: 504 — Host Timeout (X-Simulate-Timeout: true)
400 — Format Error (Missing MTI)
422 — Invalid Amount (Field 4 Missing)

routes.documentation:
ISO8583 Reversal Request — MTI 0400 (Transaction Reversal)

SAMPLE REQUEST — Accepted:
POST http://localhost:5000/reversal
Content-Type: application/json
{
  "mti": "0400",
  "fields": {
    "2": "5413330089010012",
    "3": "000000",
    "4": "000000001000",
    "11": "123456",
    "41": "TERM001"
  }
}

SAMPLE REQUEST — Simulate Not Found:
Use STAN (field 11) = 999999 to trigger a 404 Not Found response.

RESPONSE CODES:
  00 = Reversal Accepted
  25 = Original Transaction Not Found
  12 = Invalid Transaction

USE CASE:
Sent by the POS terminal when a previously authorized transaction
needs to be cancelled (e.g. communication failure after 0200).

responses.body:
{
  "mti": "0410",
  "fields": {
    "11": "{{body 'fields.11'}}",
    "39": "25",
    "41": "{{body 'fields.41'}}",
    "44": "{{now 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'}}",
    "message": "REVERSAL NOT FOUND — ORIGINAL TRANSACTION DOES NOT EXIST"
  },
  "error": {
    "code": "ORIGINAL_NOT_FOUND",
    "detail": "No original transaction was found matching the provided STAN and terminal",
    "originalStan": "{{body 'fields.11'}}",
    "timestamp": "{{now 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSS'}}Z",
    "retryable": false
  },
  "log": {
    "level": "WARN",
    "event": "REVERSAL_NOT_FOUND",
    "mti_request": "0400",
    "mti_response": "0410",
    "rc": "25",
    "terminal": "{{body 'fields.41'}}",
    "stan": "{{body 'fields.11'}}",
    "ts": "{{now 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSS'}}Z"
  }
}
responses.label: 404 — Original Transaction Not Found (STAN=999999)
400 — Invalid MTI for Reversal

routes.documentation:
ISO8583 Network Management Request — MTI 0800 (End-of-Day Settlement)

SAMPLE REQUEST — Success:
POST http://localhost:5000/settlement
Content-Type: application/json
{
  "mti": "0800",
  "fields": {
    "11": "000001",
    "41": "TERM001",
    "70": "301"
  }
}

SAMPLE REQUEST — Simulate System Error:
Set terminal ID (field 41) = TERM999 to trigger a 503 response.

SAMPLE REQUEST — Simulate Batch Mismatch:
Set field 70 = 999 to trigger a 409 Conflict response.

RESPONSE CODES:
  00 = Settlement Success
  96 = System Malfunction
  58 = Transaction Not Permitted

FIELD MAP:
  11 = STAN
  41 = Terminal ID
  70 = Network Management Information Code
       301 = Echo Test
       401 = Cutover
       501 = Sign-On
       601 = End-of-Day Settlement

responses.body:
{
  "mti": "0810",
  "fields": {
    "11": "{{body 'fields.11'}}",
    "39": "96",
    "41": "{{body 'fields.41'}}",
    "44": "{{now 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'}}",
    "message": "SETTLEMENT FAILED — SYSTEM MALFUNCTION"
  },
  "error": {
    "code": "SYSTEM_MALFUNCTION",
    "detail": "Settlement could not be completed due to an internal system error",
    "timestamp": "{{now 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSS'}}Z",
    "retryAfter": 300,
    "retryable": true
  },
  "log": {
    "level": "ERROR",
    "event": "SETTLEMENT_FAILED",
    "mti_request": "0800",
    "mti_response": "0810",
    "rc": "96",
    "terminal": "{{body 'fields.41'}}",
    "stan": "{{body 'fields.11'}}",
    "ts": "{{now 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSS'}}Z"
  }
}
responses.label: 503 — System Malfunction (Terminal=TERM999)

responses.body:
{
  "mti": "0810",
  "fields": {
    "11": "{{body 'fields.11'}}",
    "39": "58",
    "41": "{{body 'fields.41'}}",
    "44": "{{now 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'}}",
    "message": "TRANSACTION NOT PERMITTED — INVALID NETWORK MANAGEMENT CODE"
  },
  "error": {
    "code": "INVALID_NMI_CODE",
    "detail": "Field 70 (Network Management Information Code) value is not supported",
    "received": "{{body 'fields.70'}}",
    "supported": ["301", "401", "501", "601"],
    "timestamp": "{{now 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSS'}}Z",
    "retryable": false
  },
  "log": {
    "level": "WARN",
    "event": "INVALID_NMI",
    "mti_request": "0800",
    "mti_response": "0810",
    "rc": "58",
    "nmi": "{{body 'fields.70'}}",
    "terminal": "{{body 'fields.41'}}",
    "ts": "{{now 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSS'}}Z"
  }
}
responses.label: 409 — Invalid NMI Code (field 70 = 999)

responses.body:
{
  "mti": "0810",
  "fields": {
    "11": "{{body 'fields.11'}}",
    "39": "00",
    "41": "{{body 'fields.41'}}",
    "44": "{{now 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'}}",
    "70": "{{body 'fields.70'}}",
    "message": "SETTLEMENT SUCCESS"
  },
  "metadata": {
    "settlementId": "STL-{{now 'YYYYMMDD'}}-{{faker 'number.int' min=1000 max=9999}}",
    "settlementDate": "{{now 'YYYY-MM-DD'}}",
    "settlementTime": "{{now 'HH:mm:ss'}}",
    "timestamp": "{{now 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSS'}}Z",
    "terminalId": "{{body 'fields.41'}}",
    "stan": "{{body 'fields.11'}}",
    "batchNumber": "{{faker 'number.int' min=1 max=999}}",
    "totalTransactions": "{{faker 'number.int' min=1 max=500}}",
    "totalAmount": "{{faker 'number.int' min=10000 max=9999999}}",
    "currency": "USD",
    "nmiCode": "{{body 'fields.70'}}",
    "responseCode": "00",
    "responseDescription": "Settlement Completed Successfully"
  },
  "log": {
    "level": "INFO",
    "event": "SETTLEMENT_SUCCESS",
    "mti_request": "0800",
    "mti_response": "0810",
    "rc": "00",
    "terminal": "{{body 'fields.41'}}",
    "stan": "{{body 'fields.11'}}",
    "ts": "{{now 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSS'}}Z"
  }
}
responses.label: 200 — Settlement Success [DEFAULT]
